Final Project

2026-04-16

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ ggplot2   3.5.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.0
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.1.0     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
#Loading Data
airline_data <- read_csv("airline_route_profitability.csv")
## Rows: 7974 Columns: 33
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr   (8): Flight_Number, Origin, Destination, Route, Aircraft_Type, Season,...
## dbl  (24): Aircraft_Capacity, Passengers, Load_Factor, Flight_Hours, Ticket_...
## date  (1): Flight_Date
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
glimpse(airline_data)
## Rows: 7,974
## Columns: 33
## $ Flight_Number           <chr> "EK8960", "EK3960", "EK7529", "EK4543", "EK311…
## $ Flight_Date             <date> 2024-12-20, 2024-05-13, 2024-10-12, 2024-06-2…
## $ Origin                  <chr> "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB…
## $ Destination             <chr> "ORD", "HYD", "CDG", "DEL", "RUH", "KWI", "IST…
## $ Route                   <chr> "DXB-ORD", "DXB-HYD", "DXB-CDG", "DXB-DEL", "D…
## $ Aircraft_Type           <chr> "Boeing 777-300ER", "Boeing 787-9", "Boeing 78…
## $ Aircraft_Capacity       <dbl> 396, 296, 296, 296, 180, 180, 296, 189, 180, 2…
## $ Passengers              <dbl> 308, 234, 251, 229, 142, 171, 281, 148, 171, 2…
## $ Load_Factor             <dbl> 0.7791, 0.7910, 0.8502, 0.7748, 0.7901, 0.9500…
## $ Flight_Hours            <dbl> 14.5, 4.2, 7.5, 3.5, 2.2, 2.0, 5.0, 1.5, 2.0, …
## $ Season                  <chr> "Peak", "Normal", "Shoulder", "Low", "Shoulder…
## $ Route_Category          <chr> "Long Haul", "Medium Haul", "Long Haul", "Medi…
## $ Demand_Level            <chr> "Medium", "Medium", "High", "High", "Medium", …
## $ Ticket_Revenue          <dbl> 410785.49, 145890.17, 602841.03, 126485.16, 32…
## $ Ancillary_Revenue       <dbl> 53431.94, 17695.27, 78724.16, 17543.26, 3871.6…
## $ Total_Revenue           <dbl> 464217.43, 163585.44, 681565.19, 144028.42, 36…
## $ Fuel_Cost               <dbl> 131033.88, 21338.76, 41011.77, 17333.86, 5576.…
## $ Maintenance_Cost        <dbl> 50750, 9240, 16500, 7700, 2530, 2300, 11000, 1…
## $ Crew_Cost               <dbl> 21750, 5040, 9000, 4200, 1716, 1560, 6000, 120…
## $ Depreciation_Cost       <dbl> 65250, 13440, 24000, 11200, 3740, 3400, 16000,…
## $ Insurance_Cost          <dbl> 11600, 2520, 4500, 2100, 616, 560, 3000, 450, …
## $ Airport_Fees            <dbl> 4262.30, 2016.63, 10764.79, 6508.04, 4718.58, …
## $ Catering_Cost           <dbl> 5185.86, 5851.01, 4134.08, 6508.73, 3360.52, 3…
## $ Handling_Cost           <dbl> 4460.11, 5425.84, 3761.85, 4440.93, 3414.18, 5…
## $ Navigation_Fees         <dbl> 10636.90, 3027.25, 3431.70, 2079.79, 1662.49, …
## $ Sales_Distribution_Cost <dbl> 78193.60, 21586.21, 100188.97, 22686.82, 5133.…
## $ Passenger_Service_Cost  <dbl> 5100.09, 6022.20, 6514.22, 4791.21, 3094.65, 4…
## $ Overhead_Cost           <dbl> 88545.73, 17057.61, 31347.38, 15328.62, 8252.2…
## $ Marketing_Cost          <dbl> 25883.92, 8820.56, 23695.34, 6795.49, 1492.53,…
## $ IT_Systems_Cost         <dbl> 3769.37, 1937.81, 3415.99, 2245.61, 1273.27, 2…
## $ Total_Cost              <dbl> 506421.77, 123323.88, 282266.09, 113919.11, 46…
## $ Profit                  <dbl> -42204.34, 40261.57, 399299.10, 30109.31, -100…
## $ Profit_Margin           <dbl> -9.09, 24.61, 58.59, 20.91, -27.54, 15.75, 27.…
head(airline_data)
## # A tibble: 6 × 33
##   Flight_Number Flight_Date Origin Destination Route   Aircraft_Type   
##   <chr>         <date>      <chr>  <chr>       <chr>   <chr>           
## 1 EK8960        2024-12-20  DXB    ORD         DXB-ORD Boeing 777-300ER
## 2 EK3960        2024-05-13  DXB    HYD         DXB-HYD Boeing 787-9    
## 3 EK7529        2024-10-12  DXB    CDG         DXB-CDG Boeing 787-9    
## 4 EK4543        2024-06-25  DXB    DEL         DXB-DEL Boeing 787-9    
## 5 EK3114        2024-04-20  DXB    RUH         DXB-RUH Airbus A320     
## 6 EK1737        2024-02-06  DXB    KWI         DXB-KWI Airbus A320     
## # ℹ 27 more variables: Aircraft_Capacity <dbl>, Passengers <dbl>,
## #   Load_Factor <dbl>, Flight_Hours <dbl>, Season <chr>, Route_Category <chr>,
## #   Demand_Level <chr>, Ticket_Revenue <dbl>, Ancillary_Revenue <dbl>,
## #   Total_Revenue <dbl>, Fuel_Cost <dbl>, Maintenance_Cost <dbl>,
## #   Crew_Cost <dbl>, Depreciation_Cost <dbl>, Insurance_Cost <dbl>,
## #   Airport_Fees <dbl>, Catering_Cost <dbl>, Handling_Cost <dbl>,
## #   Navigation_Fees <dbl>, Sales_Distribution_Cost <dbl>, …
#Missing value check
colSums(is.na(airline_data))
##           Flight_Number             Flight_Date                  Origin 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##             Destination                   Route           Aircraft_Type 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##       Aircraft_Capacity              Passengers             Load_Factor 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##            Flight_Hours                  Season          Route_Category 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##            Demand_Level          Ticket_Revenue       Ancillary_Revenue 
##                       0                       0                     271 
##           Total_Revenue               Fuel_Cost        Maintenance_Cost 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##               Crew_Cost       Depreciation_Cost          Insurance_Cost 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##            Airport_Fees           Catering_Cost           Handling_Cost 
##                       0                     265                     256 
##         Navigation_Fees Sales_Distribution_Cost  Passenger_Service_Cost 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##           Overhead_Cost          Marketing_Cost         IT_Systems_Cost 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##              Total_Cost                  Profit           Profit_Margin 
##                       0                       0                       0
airline_clean <- na.omit(airline_data)
glimpse(airline_clean)
## Rows: 7,182
## Columns: 33
## $ Flight_Number           <chr> "EK8960", "EK3960", "EK7529", "EK4543", "EK311…
## $ Flight_Date             <date> 2024-12-20, 2024-05-13, 2024-10-12, 2024-06-2…
## $ Origin                  <chr> "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB", "DXB…
## $ Destination             <chr> "ORD", "HYD", "CDG", "DEL", "RUH", "KWI", "IST…
## $ Route                   <chr> "DXB-ORD", "DXB-HYD", "DXB-CDG", "DXB-DEL", "D…
## $ Aircraft_Type           <chr> "Boeing 777-300ER", "Boeing 787-9", "Boeing 78…
## $ Aircraft_Capacity       <dbl> 396, 296, 296, 296, 180, 180, 296, 189, 180, 2…
## $ Passengers              <dbl> 308, 234, 251, 229, 142, 171, 281, 148, 171, 2…
## $ Load_Factor             <dbl> 0.7791, 0.7910, 0.8502, 0.7748, 0.7901, 0.9500…
## $ Flight_Hours            <dbl> 14.5, 4.2, 7.5, 3.5, 2.2, 2.0, 5.0, 1.5, 2.0, …
## $ Season                  <chr> "Peak", "Normal", "Shoulder", "Low", "Shoulder…
## $ Route_Category          <chr> "Long Haul", "Medium Haul", "Long Haul", "Medi…
## $ Demand_Level            <chr> "Medium", "Medium", "High", "High", "Medium", …
## $ Ticket_Revenue          <dbl> 410785.49, 145890.17, 602841.03, 126485.16, 32…
## $ Ancillary_Revenue       <dbl> 53431.94, 17695.27, 78724.16, 17543.26, 3871.6…
## $ Total_Revenue           <dbl> 464217.43, 163585.44, 681565.19, 144028.42, 36…
## $ Fuel_Cost               <dbl> 131033.88, 21338.76, 41011.77, 17333.86, 5576.…
## $ Maintenance_Cost        <dbl> 50750, 9240, 16500, 7700, 2530, 2300, 11000, 1…
## $ Crew_Cost               <dbl> 21750, 5040, 9000, 4200, 1716, 1560, 6000, 120…
## $ Depreciation_Cost       <dbl> 65250, 13440, 24000, 11200, 3740, 3400, 16000,…
## $ Insurance_Cost          <dbl> 11600, 2520, 4500, 2100, 616, 560, 3000, 450, …
## $ Airport_Fees            <dbl> 4262.30, 2016.63, 10764.79, 6508.04, 4718.58, …
## $ Catering_Cost           <dbl> 5185.86, 5851.01, 4134.08, 6508.73, 3360.52, 3…
## $ Handling_Cost           <dbl> 4460.11, 5425.84, 3761.85, 4440.93, 3414.18, 5…
## $ Navigation_Fees         <dbl> 10636.90, 3027.25, 3431.70, 2079.79, 1662.49, …
## $ Sales_Distribution_Cost <dbl> 78193.60, 21586.21, 100188.97, 22686.82, 5133.…
## $ Passenger_Service_Cost  <dbl> 5100.09, 6022.20, 6514.22, 4791.21, 3094.65, 4…
## $ Overhead_Cost           <dbl> 88545.73, 17057.61, 31347.38, 15328.62, 8252.2…
## $ Marketing_Cost          <dbl> 25883.92, 8820.56, 23695.34, 6795.49, 1492.53,…
## $ IT_Systems_Cost         <dbl> 3769.37, 1937.81, 3415.99, 2245.61, 1273.27, 2…
## $ Total_Cost              <dbl> 506421.77, 123323.88, 282266.09, 113919.11, 46…
## $ Profit                  <dbl> -42204.34, 40261.57, 399299.10, 30109.31, -100…
## $ Profit_Margin           <dbl> -9.09, 24.61, 58.59, 20.91, -27.54, 15.75, 27.…
#Average profit by season
airline_clean %>%
  group_by(Season) %>%
  summarize(avg_profit = mean(Profit))
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
##   Season   avg_profit
##   <chr>         <dbl>
## 1 Low          26698.
## 2 Normal       65231.
## 3 Peak        110686.
## 4 Shoulder     81499.
# Average profit by route category
airline_clean %>%
  group_by(Route_Category) %>%
  summarize(avg_profit = mean(Profit))
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   Route_Category avg_profit
##   <chr>               <dbl>
## 1 Long Haul         159512.
## 2 Medium Haul        30559.
## 3 Short Haul         -8774.
#Average profit by demand level
airline_clean %>%
  group_by(Demand_Level) %>%
  summarize(avg_profit = mean(Profit))
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   Demand_Level avg_profit
##   <chr>             <dbl>
## 1 High            107098.
## 2 Medium           23848.
#Flight count by season
ggplot(data = airline_clean, aes(x = Season)) +
  geom_bar()

Low - slowest travel period Normal - regular travel period Peak - Not super busy, not super quiet, more than Normal. Shoulder - busiest travel period

#How profit spreads out across flights?

ggplot(airline_clean, aes(x = Profit)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 50000)

x-axis values are in dollars. 0e+00 = $0, 5e+05 = $500,000, 1e+06 = $1,000

#Profit by Route Category
ggplot(airline_clean, aes(x = Route_Category, y = Profit)) +
  geom_boxplot()

#Load Factor VS Profit
ggplot(airline_clean, aes(x = Load_Factor, y = Profit)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1/3)

#Load_Factor = Passengers/Aircraft Capacity
